title: North Atlantic Engineering Consultants
description: Established in the early 1980's North Atlantic Engineering Consultants has since inception conscientiously led the way with holistic sustainable energy solutions and responsible engineering practice. With a human resource base of professionals of the highest calibre, who are qualified and experienced in project design, co-ordination and management, the firm has grown steadily over the years with a steadfast commitment to quality and cutting-edge design, establishing itself as a trend setter in the field of sustainable building services engineering.
